title: 24cm Fine Mesh Sieve – Premium 304 Stainless Steel (18/8) – Large Strainer/Sifter for The Kitchen
features: HIGH QUALITY 304 STAINLESS STEEL SIEVE - made from professional quality and premium 304 stainless steel. They are built to last as they are much stronger, resistant, durable and anticorrosive than cheaper 201 stainless steel and plastic alternatives

FINE TWILL MESH AND 24CM SIZE - organise yourself with our professional quality food strainer. This unique sieve with 4 TIG welding points, is one of the largest strainers in the market and due to its size is useful for a wide range of needs in the kitchen
IDEAL FOR LARGE PORTIONS, INCLUDING PASTA, VEGETABLES, FRUIT, QUINOA – rice, almond milk, smoothies flour, sauces, gravy and much more can be prepared to perfection with our large strainer

VERSATILE FOR USE IN THE KITCHEN - whether you need to drain, strain or sieve, you will achieve excellent results with our 24cm kitchen strainer. Food won’t get stuck under the rim making it easy and convenient to clean

DISHWASHER SAFE AND 100% SATISFACTION GUARANTEE – our sieve is dishwasher safe, LFGB, EU and FDA certified. Our fine mesh kitchen sifter is built to last and won’t break. So you can purchase and use at home with complete peace of mind
description: Detailed size information This large premium sieve will have most of your needs covered in the kitchen. 45cm x 24cm x 9cm is perfect for draining quinoa, rinsing rice, sieving flour when baking, for big recipes and for draining pasta and even potatoes to give them rough edges before roasting. This large mesh sieve features a reinforced four-point argon arc TIG welding to stand up to frequent use. Superior design Our professional workmanship ensures a distinctive and unique kitchen utensil which has a rim design to prevent food from getting stuck making it more hygienic and more convenient to clean than similar products on the market. A stylish kitchen utensil Regardless of the style of your kitchen, our strainer set will match your décor and make food prep much easier. Not only do our sieve look good but is large and practical. No plastics are used in the production of our sieve, it is robust and extremely durable. Treat yourself with a unique premium quality kitchen utensil.
